title: Design System: Calendario Hall of the Novice EX

display.purpose: Calendar title, section headers. Always Cinzel.

headline.purpose: Sidebar sections, modal titles, event headings.

title.purpose: Event titles in ledger, card headers.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Default state for cards and containers.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Appears on hover/focus for interactive cards.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button for save, submit, navigate.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1D6A6A; color: #fff; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #124949; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #735C00; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Accent Button
components.description: Secondary CTA for important actions. Gold background with deep teal text.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { background: #D4AF37; color: #124949; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: #E5C158; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #735C00; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action for cancel, close, secondary interactions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #6B7A8A; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid rgba(29, 106, 106, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F6F3EA; color: #3E4A56; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #735C00; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Calendar Cell
components.description: Individual day cell in the calendar grid. Shows day number, event count, and crystal indicator.
components.css: .ds-calendar-cell { background: #FAF6ED; border: 1px solid rgba(29, 106, 106, 0.2); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; min-height: 120px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 0.25s; } .ds-calendar-cell:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: #D4AF37; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(62, 74, 86, 0.1); } .ds-calendar-cell.selected { background: #D4AF37; border-color: #735C00; } .ds-calendar-day { font-family: 'Cinzel', Georgia, serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #735C00; } .ds-calendar-cell.selected .ds-calendar-day { color: #124949; } .ds-calendar-count { font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #6B7A8A; }

components.name: Event Card
components.description: Event listing in the daily ledger. Shows time, title, type, and instructor.
components.html:
09:00 — 11:30

Aula de Magia Arcana

Spells
components.css: .ds-event-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid rgba(29, 106, 106, 0.1); border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; transition: box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-event-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(62, 74, 86, 0.1); border-color: #D4AF37; } .ds-event-time { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #735C00; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-event-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', Georgia, serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #124949; margin: 8px 0; } .ds-event-type { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #1D6A6A; background: #E8F4F4; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Filter Button
components.description: Sidebar filter button for event type selection.
components.css: .ds-filter-btn { width: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; background: transparent; color: #6B7A8A; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-filter-btn:hover { background: #E8F4F4; color: #1D6A6A; } .ds-filter-btn.active { background: #D4AF37; color: #124949; font-weight: 600; } .ds-filter-count { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', monospace; font-size: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input for forms. Linen background with teal-tinted border.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #F6F3EA; border: 1px solid rgba(29, 106, 106, 0.2); border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #3E4A56; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #1D6A6A; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(29, 106, 106, 0.15); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B7A8A; }

components.name: Modal
components.description: Overlay modal for event and type forms. Gold border treatment.
components.css: .ds-modal { background: #FAF6ED; border: 2px solid #D4AF37; border-radius: 20px; max-width: 480px; width: 100%; box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(62, 74, 86, 0.15); } .ds-modal-bar { height: 4px; background: #D4AF37; border-radius: 20px 20px 0 0; } .ds-modal-content { padding: 24px; } .ds-modal-content h3 { font-family: 'Cinzel', Georgia, serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #735C00; }

components.name: Chip / Tag
components.description: Small pill badge for event type labels.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #E8F4F4; color: #1D6A6A; } .ds-chip.gold { background: #F5E6B8; color: #735C00; } .ds-chip.lavender { background: #EDE8F3; color: #9B8BB4; }

narrative.overview: The calendario design system evokes an ancient academy's schedule board — a living document pinned to a parchment wall, where events are cataloged with the quiet authority of a well-organized institution. Every surface rests on warm ivory parchment; teal carries the institutional identity of the Sharlayan academy; gold marks moments of distinction and active states; lavender adds scholarly softness that prevents the palette from feeling rigid. This system explicitly rejects the sterile utilitarianism of generic calendar apps and the neon-timed urgency of gaming event trackers.
keyCharacteristics: Warm parchment foundation with institutional teal identity
Serif display type (Cinzel) paired with modern sans-serif body (Hanken Grotesk)
Soft ambient shadows and gentle transitions — never jarring
Gold reserved for active states and moments of distinction
Color-coded event types that create visual rhythm without clutter

rules.name: The Gold Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Scholar's Gold appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is what makes it meaningful.

rules.name: The Parchment Foundation Rule
rules.body: The warm ivory background (#FAF6ED) is non-negotiable. Never replace it with pure white (#FFF) or cool gray.

rules.name: The Serif Authority Rule
rules.body: Cinzel is reserved for display, headlines, and titles — moments where the design speaks with authority. It never appears in body text, labels, or UI chrome.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus).

dos: Do use the warm parchment background (#FAF6ED) as the canvas for every surface.
Do reserve Scholar's Gold (#D4AF37) for moments of distinction — CTAs, active states, selected days.
Do use Cinzel for display and headlines to carry the academic authority of the brand.
Do keep shadows diffused and ambient. The system breathes through gentle lifts, not dramatic drops.
Do use generous whitespace and calm hierarchy.
Do color-code event types with teal, gold, and lavender to create visual rhythm.
donts: Don't use generic calendar app aesthetics — sterile white backgrounds, flat utilitarian design.
Don't use gaming event tracker aesthetics — neon timers, countdown urgency, aggressive dark themes.
Don't replace the warm parchment background with pure white (#FFF) or cool gray.
Don't use Cinzel in body text, labels, or UI chrome.
Don't overuse gold. If every element is gold, none of them are special.
Don't use navy blue (#002446) as the primary color. The institutional identity is Sharlayan Teal (#1D6A6A).
